text.title: Rate Limiting Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Multi-tenant SaaS API limits
example.note: classes: auth token_bucket 5rps burst 10; read sliding_window_counter 100rps; write sliding_window_counter 20rps; admin token_bucket 1rps burst 5. key_strategy=user_id authenticated, composite for anonymous. storage=redis ttl_seconds=120. headers Retry-After + RateLimit-Remaining. fail_mode=open (Redis brownout should not break paying customers). bypass /healthz /metrics. Brute-force attack on /login auto-throttled at 5rps; tenant noise isolated by user_id keying.

example.title: Self-DoS via healthz throttle
example.note: Engineer set per-IP rate limit across all paths including /healthz. LB checks from one IP exceeded 100rps; LB removed all pods. Tree caught: bypass-list-explicit (must include /healthz) and key-strategy-documented (per-IP without bypass).
